name: goodlinks-mcp
description: MCP server for the GoodLinks read-it-later app.
long_description: Gives Claude access to your saved articles, tags, and highlights from GoodLinks for research and reference, plus the ability to save new links to your library. Talks to the GoodLinks local API on your Mac. Requires GoodLinks 3.2+ with the API enabled in Settings → API.

tools.name: goodlinks_search_links
tools.description: Search GoodLinks with filters (tags, starred, read, word count, dates).

tools.name: goodlinks_get_list
tools.description: Fetch a built-in list: unread, read, starred, untagged, highlighted, all.

tools.name: goodlinks_get_link
tools.description: Fetch a single link by id or URL.

tools.name: goodlinks_get_current_link
tools.description: Fetch the link currently selected in GoodLinks.

tools.name: goodlinks_get_link_content
tools.description: Fetch article body as markdown, plaintext, or html.

tools.name: goodlinks_list_tags
tools.description: List every tag in your library.

tools.name: goodlinks_search_highlights
tools.description: Search saved highlights across the library.

tools.name: goodlinks_export_link_highlights
tools.description: Export a link's highlights as Markdown.

tools.name: goodlinks_save_link
tools.description: Save a new link (upsert by URL — updates the existing link if one already exists).

api_token.title: GoodLinks API Token
api_token.description: Bearer token from GoodLinks → Settings → API.

api_base_url.title: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: Override only if GoodLinks is running on a non-default port.
